name: Terradino
description:
Hey ya! I've decided to do more bots, this one Is based on Ben 10 Five Years Later. I'll problaly be leaned into creating more RP bots in the future (It's not like most of the people care, but i just wanted to the few who know me in Jan.AI to know that)

So... This one Is on Humungousaur, Astrodactyl and Krush home planet, Terradino.

To know more, check the YT video:

Ben 10 | Humungousaur's Homeworld (And Beyond)
